subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou in Whose oceans of mercy the sincere are immersed, and unto Whose sheltering forgiveness those near-drawn repair [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من استغرق المخلصون فی بحار رحمته و التجاء المقربون الی جوار مغفرته
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
